text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head to the dance studio at Mayano Top Gun's
request.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: One, two! One, two! Now...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Leopard pose! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Darn it. Why can't I get it right?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're here! Hear me out!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
The dance teacher said I'm too young for sexy
choreography!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Said I can't properly show off the dance until I'm
taller and curvier!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Talk about rude, right?! I'm totally sexy enough!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Talk about rude, right?! I'm totally sexy enough!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yay! ♪ I knew you'd take my side, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Heh! I'm totally curvy already! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And I can just stand on my tippy toes to look
taller!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Like thi—whoa!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Crash landing! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Th-that never happened, okay?! Let me try again!
choice_data_list: I wouldn't worry about your height.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: Just be yourself and dance however you like.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: O-oh my!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Do you really mean that?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It's like you're saying you like me just the way I
am! ☆ Aaah!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You must really love me, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There seems to have been a bit of a
misunderstanding, but whatever the case,
Mayano Top Gun is back in good spirits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, she continues to practice, even
managing to persuade the dance teacher to let
her perform how she wants.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell me you think so too! Are you saying I'm
too young for the grown-up dances?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to explain to her that playing up to her cute
side would add an extra dimension to her appeal
than just a sexy dance.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
So what you're saying is... "mature" doesn't even
begin to describe me!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: That's it, right?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
In that case, you have to help me come up with
new choreography! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
We need to come up with a dance that shows off
all of my charms! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
With your help, I'm sure we can come up with a
dance that'll knock my teacher's socks off!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'm ready to take off! Adulthood, here I come! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Afterward, I spend some time helping Mayano
Top Gun come up with her new choreography.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She earns high praise from her dance teacher
when she performs a few days later.
